headline: Buffett Steps Aside: Abel's First Berkshire 13F Buys Delta Air Lines, Exits Visa And Mastercard
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-A)(NYSE:BRK-B) is no longer run by Warren Buffett, with Greg Abel as CEO. New positions in Delta, Macy's, Alphabet C. Exits include Visa, Mastercard, UnitedHealth, Domino's, Aon, Pool, Amazon, Heico, Formula One.

headline: Prediction. The Warsh Fed Trade Is Just Getting Started and These 3 Bank Stocks Under $55 Have the Most to Gain
summary: Treasury yields are climbing as traders position for the Kevin Warsh appointment to the Federal Reserve, with markets pricing in a more growth-friendly path that could steepen the yield curve and reprice fixed-rate bank assets at higher levels. The 10Y-2Y spread sat at 0.47% on May 14, 2026, with the 2-year yield rising 0.12% over ... Prediction. headline: How The Investment Narrative For Quest Diagnostics (DGX) Is Shifting With New Valuation Work
summary: Quest Diagnostics is in focus after a refreshed fair value estimate of US$223.25, up from US$218.19, modestly lifts the modeled price target. That change lines up with recent Street research where many firms are tweaking targets, with some leaning more optimistic and others emphasizing risk and near term execution. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets shape the evolving analyst narrative and what to watch next. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head...
